SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters

Class Character

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.Character
All Implemented Interfaces:
Jsonic<Character>, Repr<Character>
Direct Known Subclasses:
PoliticalActor
public class Character extends Object implements Repr<Character>, Jsonic<Character>
The most basic form of Character, from which other types of Characters inherit.

Contains fields and methods which all Characters possess, including Demographics, Name, and Birthday.

  • Constructor Details

    • Character

      public Character(CharacterManager cm, DemographicsManager dm, MapManager mm, NameManager nm)
      Creates a Character with all fields generated by the CharacterManager.
      See Also:
      • invalid reference 
        #Character(Demographics, Name, Municipality, Municipality, Municipality, Date, CharacterModel)

    • Character

      public Character(Character other)
      Deep-copies the existing fields of another Character object. Optionally adds to CharacterManager's list of Characters.
      Parameters:
      other - Character to copy fields from.
      addToCharacterList - Boolean indicating whether to add the created object to the CharacterManager's list.

    • Character

      public Character(String buildstring)
      Creates a Character parsed from the Repr buildstring.
      Parameters:
      buildstring - Valid Repr-format buildstring.
      addToCharacterList - Boolean indicating whether to add the created object to the CharacterManager's list.

    • Character

      public Character(core.JSONObject json)
      Creates a character from the JSON Object structure.
      Parameters:
      json - JSONObject representing a character.

    • Character

      public Character(CharacterManager cm, DemographicsManager dm, MapManager mm, NameManager nm, Demographics demographics, Name name, Municipality birthplaceMunicipality, Municipality residenceMunicipality, LocalDate birthday, CharacterModel appearance)
      Creates a Character with the passed values. The CharacterManager will generate values for any null values passed.
      Parameters:
      demographics - Demographics object representing this Character's demographic memberships.
      name - Name object representing this Character's name.
      birthplaceMunicipality - Municipality in which this Character was born.
      residenceMunicipality - Municipality in which this Character currently resides and is located (primary residence).
      birthday - Date on which this character was born.
      appearance - CharacterModel object to be rendered for this Character.

    • Character

      public Character(CharacterManager cm, DemographicsManager dm, MapManager mm, NameManager nm, Demographics demographics, Name name, Municipality birthplaceMunicipality, Municipality currentLocationMunicipality, Municipality residenceMunicipality, LocalDate birthday, CharacterModel appearance)
      Creates a Character with the passed values. The CharacterManager will generate values for any null values passed.
      Parameters:
      demographics - Demographics object representing this Character's demographic memberships.
      name - Name object representing this Character's name.
      birthplaceMunicipality - Municipality in which this Character was born.
      currentLocationMunicipality - Municipality to which this Character is currently nearest.
      residenceMunicipality - Municipality in which this Character currently resides (primary residence).
      birthday - Date on which this character was born.
      appearance - CharacterModel object to be rendered for this Character.

    • fromJson

      public Character fromJson(core.JSONObject json)
      Interpret a JSONObject into an object of this type.
      Specified by:
      fromJson in interface Jsonic<Character>
      Parameters:
      json - A JSONObject containing any number of the fields for this object as key-value pairs.
      Returns:
      The Object interpreted from the Json. Note that this object's fields will also be set.
